case_title: RICHARD TRAMMELL VS. CK SECURITY GROUP, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAMMELL, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT CK SECURITY GROUP, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
